evidence_paragraphs.snippet: After a gathering of eleven [Faceless Men](wiki:Faceless_Men), [Arya](wiki:Arya_Stark) is interrogated by [plague face](wiki:Plague_face) and deemed ready for her first assassination. Arya disguises...
